- [Clan Wars](https://warreport.app/about/docs/features/clan_wars/): The Wars tab displays ongoing clan wars of your bookmarked players and clans. Use the filter in the …
- [Clan War League](https://warreport.app/about/docs/features/clan_war_league/): If a clan war belongs to the Clan War League, you will find a button at the bottom of the clan war …
- [Clan Capital](https://warreport.app/about/docs/features/clan_capital/): Click the menu button in the top right corner of the clan page to access this information. This page …
- [Battle](https://warreport.app/about/docs/features/battle/): Open the player page and click the battle log button in the top-right corner to access this …
- [Legend League](https://warreport.app/about/docs/features/legend_league/): Click the button in the top right corner of the player page to access this information. This page …
- [Popular Armies](https://warreport.app/about/docs/features/popular_armies/): Open the Popular Armies page from the More menu. It lists the most used army compositions of the top …
